title: Retry-After compliance contract (authored for the Retry-After-header-compliance testing task)
description: Each endpoint is documented to allow at most limit_n requests per window_seconds window per client key (carried in the api_key_header, X-Forwarded-For); request number limit_n+1 should return 429 carrying a positive Retry-After header that advertises the wait before retrying. A request before that advertised wait elapses should still be 429, and a request after it should succeed. Agents construct the Retry-After test plan from this; ground truth is the live API's observed behavior. DummyJSON is read-only and never modified; it runs a real express-rate-limit limiter (100/10s per client key, Retry-After = windowMs/1000) when booted NODE_ENV=production, which the harness exercises.
